content:
My research interests lie at the intersection of Statistics, Machine Learning and Economics.
The title of my PhD is `Policy search via multi-task Gaussian processes and reinforcement learning’, which is kindly sponsored by Just-Eat plc.. I am supervised by Petros Dellaportas.

title: Marta Grześkiewicz
